title: Connection lost error with n8n behind nginx
symptom: Users see a 'Connection lost' warning in the top right corner of any workflow. Additionally, GET requests to the WebSocket endpoint return a 401 Unauthorized error.
not_this_if: n8n is accessed directly without nginx
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect configuration in the nginx settings, particularly with the handling of WebSocket connections. Misconfigured headers or incorrect quotes can prevent proper communication between the client and the n8n server.
fix_steps: Update the nginx configuration to use correct quotes for the Connection header: change from 'Connection “Upgrade”' to 'Connection "Upgrade"'.
Ensure the proxy_http_version is set to 1.1 in the nginx configuration.
Remove any conflicting regex location blocks that may interfere with the WebSocket connection.
Restart the nginx service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Correct the nginx configuration and restart the service to resolve the 'Connection lost' issue.
